headline: Newmont Corp (NYSE:NEM) Shines in CAN SLIM Screen with 132% EPS Growth
summary: Newmont Corp (NEM) fits the CAN SLIM methodology with 132% EPS growth and strong fundamentals, though its short-term trend warrants patience before entry.
